# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

# Use yaml formatting here (optional)
apiVersion: kuma.io/v1alpha1
kind: Mesh
mesh:
  name: default # The mesh name in Kong.

accessLogs:
  -
    enabled: true # Enable access logs.
    file: access-log-default # Access log file name.
    format: common # Format of the access logs (common, json, raw).
